title: March 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 9''' is the 68th day of the year (69th in leap years). There are 297 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Neil Kaplan]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Oscar Isaac]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars:]]'' "[[Points of Origin]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 90|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 90]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Spore]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Wookieepedia#Great LucasCruft Purge|Great LucasCruft Purge]] begins on [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia|Wikipedia]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Curfew]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[Point Blank]]'' published on [[Wizards.com]].
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: At War with the Empire Volume 1]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Brothers]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars: Age of Resistance – The Official Collector's Edition|''Star Wars: Age of Resistance'' – The Official Collector's Edition]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 1|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 1]] published.
*2022 – [[Crimson Reign 3|''Crimson Reign'' 3]] published.
*2022 – [[John Korty]] dies.
<noinclude>
